Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

    The buying_power in USD returned from the request.

    dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount(AssetBuyingPowerDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount)
    The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request.
    AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder
    dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetBuyingPowerDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount> dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount)
    The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request.
    AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder
    isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed(boolean isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed)
    The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.
    AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder
    isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed(Optional<Boolean> isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed)
    The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.
    AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder
    smaAmount(AssetBuyingPowerSmaAmount smaAmount)
    The sma_amount is the special memorandum account amount in USD, returned from the request.

    The sma_amount is the special memorandum account amount in USD, returned from the request.

  • Method Details

    • buyingPowerAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder buyingPowerAmount(AssetBuyingPowerBuyingPowerAmount buyingPowerAmount)
      The buying_power in USD returned from the request.

    • buyingPowerAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder buyingPowerAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetBuyingPowerBuyingPowerAmount> buyingPowerAmount)
      The buying_power in USD returned from the request.

    • dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount(AssetBuyingPowerDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount)
      The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request. If the is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean is true this will be set from day_trade_buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator, or else if it is false it will be set from buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator.

    • dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetBuyingPowerDayTradeBuyingPowerAmount> dayTradeBuyingPowerAmount)
      The day_trade_buying_power_issued_amount is the day trade buying power of the account in USD, returned from the request. If the is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean is true this will be set from day_trade_buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator, or else if it is false it will be set from buying_power_issued value returned from the margins calculator.

    • isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed(boolean isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed)
      The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.

    • isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed(Optional<Boolean> isDayTradeBuyingPowerAllowed)
      The is_day_trade_buying_power_allowed boolean will be true if the account is a Margin account, PDT is true and SOD Account equity >= $25,000, otherwise it will be false.

    • smaAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder smaAmount(AssetBuyingPowerSmaAmount smaAmount)
      The sma_amount is the special memorandum account amount in USD, returned from the request. This will only be populated for margin accounts and is the margin equity minus the RegT requirements.

    • smaAmount

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower.Builder smaAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetBuyingPowerSmaAmount> smaAmount)
      The sma_amount is the special memorandum account amount in USD, returned from the request. This will only be populated for margin accounts and is the margin equity minus the RegT requirements.

    • build

      public AccountAssetBuyingPower build()
